The 10x PMM Scorecard

Assess your team's AI readiness across Content, Competitive Intel, and Demand Gen. See where you stand vs. average PMM teams — and the 10x frontier.

The 10x PMM Scorecard is part of The Future of Product Marketing curriculum. Full playbooks for each dimension available in the learning modules.
